subject: Fix interface name issue in multicloud test
commit_message:
Fix interface name issue in multicloud test

vagrant box bento/ubuntu-16.04 change interface name,
which cause regression

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-57

Change-Id: I3651113b0025c2433eb97263846a5d0b4119852d
Signed-off-by: Huang Haibin <haibin.huang@intel.com>

entries.message:
